positive: A minimalist and sophisticated vector graphic depicting a majestic sloth hanging from a stylized tropical vine. The scene should feature the sloth in a calm, slightly melancholy pose, contrasted against vibrant, geometric jungle foliage and delicate blooming orchids. Use a limited, high-contrast color palette of deep emerald greens, teal blues, earthy browns, and pops of mustard yellow. The style should be a blend of clean mid-century modern illustration and stylized botanical engraving, emphasizing strong black outlines and flat areas of color. Composition must be perfectly centered and contained within a circular crop area, designed to look excellent on apparel. The overall mood is whimsical and serene. Clean silhouette required.
